lineage.Process: CreateFeatureclass "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\Shape_Files\NHoods" nhoods # nhoods_Layer SAME_AS_TEMPLATE SAME_AS_TEMPLATE "PROJCS['NAD_1983_StatePlane_Rhode_Island_FIPS_3800_Feet',GEOGCS['GCS_North_American_1983',DATUM['D_North_American_1983',SPHEROID['GRS_1980',6378137.0,298.257222101]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION['Transverse_Mercator'],PARAMETER['False_Easting',328083.3333333333],PARAMETER['False_Northing',0.0],PARAMETER['Central_Meridian',-71.5],PARAMETER['Scale_Factor',0.99999375],PARAMETER['Latitude_Of_Origin',41.08333333333334],UNIT['Foot_US',0.3048006096012192]];300000.000000 200000.000000 16000.000000;0.000000 100000.000000;0.000000 100000.000000" # 0 0 0 "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\Shape_Files\NHoods\nhoods.shp"

Append nhoods_Layer "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\Shape_Files\NHoods\nhoods.shp" TEST "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\Shape_Files\NHoods\nhoods.shp"

FeatureClassToFeatureClass "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\City of Providence.mdb\Neigborhoods\nhoods" "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\Shape_Files\NHoods" nhoods # "LNAME LNAME VISIBLE;Shape_Length Shape_Leng VISIBLE;Shape_Area Shape_Area VISIBLE" SAME_AS_TEMPLATE SAME_AS_TEMPLATE # 0 "C:\Documents and Settings\benright.PLANNING\My Documents\GIS\GIS_2003\Shape_Files\NHoods\nhoods.shp"

FeatureClassToFeatureClass Y:\Shapfiles\ShapfileUpdates\NeighborhoodBoundary2010.shp "Database Connections\Connection to gis_server.sde\sde.SDE.Administrative Area" Nhoods # "LNAME 'LNAME' true true false 22 Text 0 0 ,First,#,Y:\Shapfiles\ShapfileUpdates\NeighborhoodBoundary2010.shp,LNAME,-1,-1;Shape_Leng 'Shape_Leng' true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,Y:\Shapfiles\ShapfileUpdates\NeighborhoodBoundary2010.shp,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Shape_Area 'Shape_Area' true true false 19 Double 11 18 ,First,#,Y:\Shapfiles\ShapfileUpdates\NeighborhoodBoundary2010.shp,Shape_Area,-1,-1;Acres 'Acres' true true false 19 Double 0 0 ,First,#,Y:\Shapfiles\ShapfileUpdates\NeighborhoodBoundary2010.shp,Acres,-1,-1" # "Database Connections\Connection to gis_server.sde\sde.SDE.Administrative Area\sde.SDE.Nhoods"

citeinfo.origin: REQUIRED: The name of an organization or individual that developed the data set.
citeinfo.pubdate: REQUIRED: The date when the data set is published or otherwise made available for release.
citeinfo.title: sde.SDE.Nhoods

idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.3.1.4000

descript.abstract: REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.
descript.purpose: REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.

timeperd.current: REQUIRED: The basis on which the time period of content information is determined.

sngdate.caldate: REQUIRED: The year (and optionally month, or month and day) for which the data set corresponds to the ground.

status.progress: REQUIRED: The state of the data set.
status.update: REQUIRED: The frequency with which changes and additions are made to the data set after the initial data set is completed.

bounding.westbc: REQUIRED: Western-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.eastbc: REQUIRED: Eastern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in longitude.
bounding.northbc: REQUIRED: Northern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.
bounding.southbc: REQUIRED: Southern-most coordinate of the limit of coverage expressed in latitude.

theme.themekt: REQUIRED: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords.
theme.themekey: REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.

idinfo.accconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.
idinfo.useconst: REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 3; Esri ArcGIS 10.1.1.3143

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

cntorgp.cntper: REQUIRED: The person responsible for the metadata information.
cntorgp.cntorg: REQUIRED: The organization responsible for the metadata information.

cntaddr.addrtype: REQUIRED: The mailing and/or physical address for the organization or individual.
cntaddr.city: REQUIRED: The city of the address.
cntaddr.state: REQUIRED: The state or province of the address.
cntaddr.postal: REQUIRED: The ZIP or other postal code of the address.

cntinfo.cntvoice: REQUIRED: The telephone number by which individuals can speak to the organization or individual.

altsys.altenc: Explicit elevation coordinate included with horizontal coordinates

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
